ddls:
CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "nta_code" TEXT /* Code for the neighborhood area */,
  "edu_less_than_hs" REAL /* Percentage of residents with education less than high school */,
  "edu_hs" REAL /* Percentage of residents with high school education */,
  "edu_some_college" REAL /* Percentage of residents with some college education */,
  "edu_bachelor" REAL /* Percentage of residents with a bachelor's degree */,
  "edu_graduate" REAL /* Percentage of residents with a graduate degree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nta_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "nta_code" TEXT /* Code for the neighborhood area */,
  "poverty" REAL /* Percentage of residents living in poverty */,
  "unemployment" REAL /* Percentage of unemployed residents */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median household income */,
  "median_rent" INTEGER /* Median rent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nta_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "nta_code" TEXT /* Code for the neighborhood area */,
  "preterm_births" REAL /* Rate of preterm births per 1,000 births */,
  "smm" REAL /* Severe maternal morbidity rate */,
  "gonorrhea" REAL /* Gonorrhea rate per 100,000 population */,
  "obesity" REAL /* Percentage of residents with obesity */,
  "smoking" REAL /* Percentage of residents who smoke */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nta_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_access" (
  "nta_code" TEXT /* Code for the neighborhood area */,
  "health_ins" REAL /* Percentage of residents with health insurance */,
  "medicaid_enroll" REAL /* Percentage of residents enrolled in Medicaid */,
  "late_no_prenatal_care" REAL /* Percentage of residents receiving late or no prenatal care */,
  "healthcare_accessibility" REAL /* Healthcare accessibility score (out of 100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nta_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinics" (
  "nta_code" TEXT /* Code for the neighborhood area */,
  "clinics" INTEGER /* Number of clinics in the neighborhood */,
  "community_health_centers" INTEGER /* Number of community health centers in the neighborhood */,
  "specialized_care" INTEGER /* Number of specialized care facilities in the neighborhood */,
  "urgent_care" INTEGER /* Number of urgent care facilities in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nta_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_density" (
  "nta_code" TEXT /* Code for the neighborhood area */,
  "non_pcmd" INTEGER /* Non-primary care medical providers count */,
  "clinics_and_chc_count" INTEGER /* Total count of clinics and community health centers */,
  "clinics_and_chc_density" REAL /* Density of clinics and CHCs per 100,000 population */,
  "non_pcmd_density" REAL /* Density of non-primary care providers per 100,000 population */,
  "patient_provider_ratio" REAL /* Patient-to-provider ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nta_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., public health, research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "nta_code" TEXT /* Code for the neighborhood area accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Whether the user downloaded any data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "nta_code" TEXT /* Code for the neighborhood area */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the health intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the intervention (e.g., children, adults) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "nta_code" TEXT /* Code for the neighborhood area */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., demographic, health outcomes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
